description: Change `SessionRelationalCommandExecutor.DetermineDialect` in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend/SessionRelationalCommandExecutor.cs` to fail fast for unsupported `DbConnection` implementations instead of silently defaulting to PostgreSQL. Acceptance: connection types whose full name contains `Npgsql` still resolve to `SqlDialect.Pgsql`, connection types whose full name contains `SqlClient` still resolve to `SqlDialect.Mssql`, and any other connection type throws a deterministic unsupported-dialect exception before SQL execution proceeds. Add unit coverage for both supported mappings and the unknown-connection failure path.
steps-to-verify: Add/adjust unit tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Tests.Unit/SessionRelationalCommandExecutorTests.cs` to cover PostgreSQL, SQL Server, and unknown connection types.

description: Rename `IRelationalWriteNonCollectionPersister` / `RelationalWriteNonCollectionPersister` and the containing file so the type name matches its actual scope. Prefer a no-profile name such as `IRelationalWriteNoProfilePersister` / `RelationalWriteNoProfilePersister`, because the implementation handles no-profile writes for non-collection tables, collection tables, and collection-aligned extension scopes. Acceptance: the interface name, implementation name, file name, DI registration, constructor dependencies, and related tests all use the new name; no remaining code suggests the persister excludes collection handling; the naming remains aligned with DMS-984 being the shared no-profile executor foundation.
steps-to-verify: Update references in runtime code, service registration, and unit tests so the solution builds cleanly with the new type name.

description: Consolidate the temporary profile-write fence in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend/RelationalDocumentStoreRepository.cs` so it exists in one place. Keep the current DMS-1124 behavior of rejecting profiled relational POST and PUT with `profile-aware relational writes pending DMS-1123/DMS-1105/DMS-1124`, but remove the redundant `BackendProfileWriteContext is not null` branch inside `ExecuteWriteGuardRails` once the public entry points already short-circuit. Acceptance: profiled POST and PUT still return the same `UnknownFailure`, target lookup and the write executor are still not invoked for profiled requests, and `ExecuteWriteGuardRails` no longer contains unreachable duplicate fence logic.
steps-to-verify: Keep or update the existing profile orchestration tests so they still assert that the repository fences before target lookup and executor execution.

description: Reduce the API surface of `WritePlanBatchSqlEmitter` in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend/WritePlanBatchSqlEmitter.cs`. Make the emitter `internal` and add the minimum test-only visibility needed for `EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit` in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.csproj`. Acceptance: `WritePlanBatchSqlEmitter` is no longer public, the existing emitter tests still compile and pass, and no production code outside the `EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend` assembly depends on the emitter as a public contract.
steps-to-verify: Add the necessary `InternalsVisibleTo` entry for `EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit` or otherwise preserve test access without keeping the type public.
